CbamOverview.heading: Hana.eco CBAM Solution
CbamOverview.subheading: HanaLoop supports companies in efficient CBAM compliance through expert consulting and Hana.eco.
CbamOverview.whatBody: CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism) is the EU's carbon border adjustment system that applies costs to imported goods based on embedded carbon emissions. Precise carbon data management is essential.
CbamOverview.solutionBody: HanaLoop supports efficient CBAM compliance through expert consulting and the Hana.eco solution. The Hana.eco CBAM module automates complex data management, simplifying report preparation and regulatory response.
CbamOverview.imageAlt: Port logistics scene related to CBAM

CbamInsightCards.heading: Insights from HanaLoop to Understand CBAM

items.title: EU Omnibus Package
items.subtitle: Overview of the CBAM Reform Proposal
items.body: The European Commission announced a simplification proposal for the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) as part of the 2025 Omnibus Package. The reform aims to streamline procedures and make compliance more efficient.

items.title: EU Omnibus Package
items.subtitle: CBAM Reform Proposal Explained
items.body: This document is a translation of the material published on the official CBAM website on December 17, 2024. Companies operating in the steel, aluminum, and other metals industries are encouraged to review the latest updates.

items.title: Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM)
items.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
items.body: This document is a translation of the material published on the official CBAM website on October 24, 2024. Companies in the steel, aluminum, and other metals sectors are advised to familiarize themselves with the updates.

items.title: Responding to EU CBAM
items.subtitle: with Hana.eco — Fast and Efficiently
items.body: The European Commission announced a simplification proposal for CBAM as part of the 2025 Omnibus Package. The reform is designed to streamline procedures and reduce the compliance burden for exporters to the EU.

HanaAiOverview.heading: AI-powered Carbon Management Platform Hana.eco
HanaAiOverview.subheading: Hana.eco AI helps your company manage carbon with confidence.
HanaAiOverview.leftBody: Selecting emission factors during carbon footprint calculation requires expert knowledge. Hana.eco uses AI to cluster activity data and automatically map suitable emission factors, simplifying the process and improving accuracy.
HanaAiOverview.rightTitle: Reliable Information with Reduced LLM Hallucination
HanaAiOverview.rightBody: To reduce incorrect responses caused by uncertain external sources, Hana.eco adopts an Index DB and RAG approach. This provides more reliable answers on regulation trends, emissions trading, and related topics.

items.title: Data Anomaly Detection
body: Accuracy is one of the core principles in carbon accounting.
As massive emissions activity data is collected and managed, anomalies can occur due to many factors and reduce data reliability.
Hana.eco detects these anomalies to effectively preserve data accuracy.
items.bgAlt: Background for data anomaly detection feature

items.title: Cost Reduction and Profit Optimization
items.body: Today, carbon directly represents financial value. In ETS, CBAM, and other regimes, accurate emissions forecasting helps companies maximize profits and reduce costs.
items.extraTitle: Reduction Impact Analysis via Emissions Forecasting
extraBody: Hana.eco uses AI to forecast emissions and analyze reduction effects from operational changes, supporting strategic business decisions.

items.title: Climate Regulation Response Through Carbon Management
body: Effective carbon management requires close linkage between domain knowledge and business strategy.
This enables optimal strategy planning and fast response to evolving regulations.
extraBody: Hana.eco leverages generative AI and NLP so even non-experts can understand complex regulations and respond efficiently.
items.bgAlt: Background for Carbon Buddy AI assistant feature

PcfOverview.heading: Product Carbon Footprint Management
PcfOverview.subheading: Systematic carbon footprint management for sustainable product development
PcfOverview.title: What is Product Carbon Footprint (PCF)?
PcfOverview.lead: Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) quantifies greenhouse gas emissions across the full lifecycle from raw materials to disposal.
PcfOverview.body: It is calculated under standards such as ISO 14067 and the GHG Protocol, and is essential for transparent environmental impact management.

PcfWhyNeeded.title: Why is PCF management needed?
PcfWhyNeeded.itemOneBody:
PCF is an essential metric for responding to global regulations such as CBAM, providing required product-level carbon emissions data.
ISO 14067-based calculation improves reliability and regulatory compliance, enabling proactive trade risk management.
PcfWhyNeeded.itemTwoBody: Quantifying product-level emissions helps identify which processes, materials, or supply chain elements are high-carbon factors, enabling concrete reduction strategies (alternative materials, energy efficiency, low-carbon suppliers).

PcfMainFeatures.title: Key Features of the PCF Solution
PcfMainFeatures.body: Quantify product-level emissions through process-flow-based calculations, manage embedded emissions with direct and indirect data, and identify reduction priorities through visualization. Effectively supports global regulatory compliance and carbon reduction strategy development.
PcfMainFeatures.caption: *Example screen of the Hana.eco PCF solution.
PcfMainFeatures.imageAlt: Example view of key PCF solution features

Scope3Overview.heading: Scope 3 Emissions Accounting Solution
Scope3Overview.subheading: Manage Scope 3 emissions systematically with Hana.eco.
Scope3Overview.whySubheading: See the reasons why Scope 3 management matters.

cards.title: Climate regulation and customer response
cards.body: Global disclosure standards such as IFRS S2, TCFD, CDP, and SBTI require Scope 3 emissions disclosure. Global customers also ask suppliers to provide Scope 3 data.

cards.title: Prevent greenwashing and improve transparency
cards.body: Without proper Scope 3 management, incomplete or distorted information can trigger greenwashing concerns. Institutions such as SBTI and CDP treat Scope 3 disclosure quality as a key signal of transparency and trust.

cards.title: Manage value-chain risks
cards.body: Scope 3 includes indirect emissions across the supply chain and can become a major risk source. Proactive climate risk response requires a systematic understanding and management of emissions across the full value chain.

Scope3Process.title: Scope 3 Management Process
Scope3Process.subtitle: Explore the Scope 3 management process powered by Hana.eco.

Scope3MainFeatures.heading: Key Features of Scope 3 Solution
Scope3MainFeatures.subheading: Explore the key features of the Hana.eco Scope 3 solution.

items.title: Effortless Management of Large-Scale Activity Data

details.body: Supports category classification, emission factor mapping, unit conversion, and emission calculation for large volumes of activity data.
Group similar activity items to streamline emission factor management and tracking.

items.title: Emission Trend Visualization Across Multiple Dimensions

details.lead: Intuitive Understanding of Carbon Emission Flows
details.body: Visualize data across various analysis dimensions — activity data groups, calculation methods, and supplier-level emissions — for easy understanding of carbon flow.

details.lead: Identify High-Emission Areas and Derive Reduction Strategies
details.body: Use Scope 3 emission statistics to identify carbon emission trends and high-emission areas across the supply chain, and develop targeted reduction activities.

SolutionClimateManagement.heading: Climate Management
SolutionClimateManagement.subheading: Resources are finite, but potential is limitless.
SolutionClimateManagement.message:
Realize environmental, economic,
and social benefits simultaneously with digital solutions!
SolutionClimateManagement.itemOneBody: Aligned with rapidly changing business environments and market demands, we leverage digital technology to maximize our clients' potential and business value. Beyond technology, we elevate corporate culture to enhance satisfaction and productivity within client organizations.
SolutionClimateManagement.itemTwoTitle: Eco-Friendly Solutions Built on the Hana.eco Platform
SolutionClimateManagement.itemTwoBody: The platform provides guidance on environmental regulations and market insights, enables rapid discovery and trading of eco-friendly technologies, and helps create a cleaner value chain — empowering clients to grow in a sustainable way. Ultimately, it contributes to the development of a more responsible and ethical industry.

CbamCertified.title: LRQA-Certified CBAM Solution
CbamCertified.subtitle: First in Korea to receive a verification statement of conformity for the EU Emissions Trading System and the EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism from Lloyd's Register Quality Assurance (LRQA)

cards.title: Product & Precursor Management (CN Code Management)
cards.description: Manage products and precursors in an integrated manner, and systematically register and track the CN codes required for CBAM-regulated goods. This enables you to easily obtain the foundational data needed for carbon emission analysis and reporting by product.

cards.title: Installation Setup & Process Management
cards.description: Configure and manage information for each manufacturing facility and the production process flow. This plays a key role in improving the accuracy of emission data and process-level emission calculations required for CBAM reports.
cards.imageAlt: Installation setup and process management visualization

cards.title: Embedded Emissions Calculation & Analysis
cards.description: Calculate direct and indirect emissions generated during product manufacturing on a per-product basis. The results allow you to analyze carbon intensity, high-emission factors, and areas for improvement by product — useful not only for regulatory compliance but also for developing carbon reduction strategies.
cards.imageAlt: Embedded emissions calculation and analysis visualization

cards.title: CBAM Report Generation
cards.description: Automatically generate reports compliant with CBAM regulations based on collected activity data and emission information. Efficiently support European exporters in meeting their CBAM reporting obligations — without complex regulatory interpretation or manual effort.

cards.title: Standard
items: For steel and aluminum companies requiring CBAM compliance
Carbon management for single or multiple plants and product carbon footprint management by CBAM standards

cards.title: Supply Chain - LITE
items: For distribution centers requiring CBAM compliance
Collect, track, and manage embedded emissions data from multiple suppliers

cards.title: Supply Chain - ENTERPRISE
